title: Range Sum Query â€” Mutable (Segment Tree)
pattern: Segment Tree â€” Range Query with Point Updates
coreIdea: Support efficient range-sum queries and point updates on an array using a segment tree, where each node represents the sum of a range, allowing both operations in O(log n) instead of O(n).
recognitionCues: asks for both range queries AND updates on an array, repeated multiple times
naive recomputation per query would be too slow, hinting at segment tree or BIT
approach: Build a segment tree where each leaf represents one array element and each internal node holds the sum of its children's range. Update: change a leaf value, then propagate the change up to all ancestor nodes. Query: recursively combine sums from tree nodes whose range fully or partially overlaps the query range.
timeComplexity: O(log n) per update/query, O(n) to build
